item.title: Cats Have No Idea They're Cats! Your cat didn't come with a manual on how to be a cat. They learned everything from watching you. Scientists call it species learning, and it explains why some cats act more like dogs, like humans, or like anything except a
item.description: By @gia.hieu.do4: Cats Have No Idea They're Cats! Your cat didn't come with a manual on how to be a cat. They learned everything from watching you. Scientists call it species learning, and it explains why some cats act more like dogs, like humans, or like anything except a
